v09.original: when Patient.id = 'Measles49.3' then "Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note" and "Guidance" = 'May vaccinate client with measles supplementary dose as supplementary dose was not administered, measles routine immunization schedule is complete and no live vaccine administered in the past 4 weeks.
v09.modified: when Patient.id = 'Measles49.3' then "Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note" and "Guidance" != 'May vaccinate client with measles supplementary dose as supplementary dose was not administered, measles routine immunization schedule is complete and no live vaccine administered in the past 4 weeks.

v10.original: when Patient.id = 'Measles50.1' then "Measles immunization schedule is complete" and "Guidance" = 'Measles immunization schedule is complete. Measles supplementary dose was administered.'
v10.modified: when Patient.id != 'Measles50.1' then "Measles immunization schedule is complete" and "Guidance" = 'Measles immunization schedule is complete. Measles supplementary dose was administered.'
